content: Backend: Statement of Changes in Equity + Financial Ratios + Revenue Trend endpoints
Frontend: Period Preset Component + Financial Ratios KPI bar
Frontend: P&L enhanced visualization (waterfall, trend, donut)
Frontend: Cashflow enhanced visualization (stacked area, running balance)
Frontend: Balance Sheet enhanced viz (composition donut + asset treemap)
Frontend: SCE (Perubahan Ekuitas) tab with waterfall
Frontend: Drill-down from report row → GL modal
Frontend: Period comparison toggle (current vs prior period with % change)
